title: Create: Old Infrastructure
description:
an addon create that adds decorative blocks, levers, electric lamps and lanterns and signal code, I'm being precise but it's an alpha, practically none of the blocks are craftable and some don't work at the moment.

the project work in progress
body:
![presentation ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/821f1f86e9efd8d1c860d2741592a3545c12a8df.png)
# **Create:Old Infrastructure**

if you find your industrial and innovative minecraft world lacking in color, this mod will take care of the little details, adding a decorative and immersive dimension to your game with several additions such as colored lamps, paint, railway equipment, etc. Finally, take a look at the color and small details that are the main element of this mod.

##  colored lantern:
![colored lantern:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13847a9be53e7f67d82b2738d91c7b43debcd97c.jpeg)
## colored buffer:
![colored buffer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d417319e0e9620889be2b054f227888cc627003.jpeg)

![colorful wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7c9b93f0792433835ed64bbd93292cae7d19b28.jpeg)
![wool casing and silver ore block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56b61eb9f2ef71d598140a1fda38557e8207407f.jpeg)

![paint bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa4fdfa76b9f57304c1f3ca97da669616363c0fa.jpeg)
_the the colored indicator changes their text with the black brush_

![electrical stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1416c19c987461843dc321cda07175dbda8c32bd.jpeg)![electric bell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/912391118cd1ed949830053df8dcf9ccfa8f3b14.jpeg)![redstone coil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a137ca6af48602a2e6ab02d252aa76e2386553a.jpeg)
